title: nephroia carolina
intro: Nephroia carolina, also known as American Uva Ursi, is a perennial plant native to North America, specifically the eastern regions of the United States and Canada. It is a member of the heath family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic qualities, which come from the presence of compounds like arbutin and hydroquinone. The plant's medicinal properties make it beneficial for urinary tract health, with traditional uses including treating kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and incontinence. Nephroia carolina can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and has been used in traditional medicine to promote urinary health and prevent infections.
